landing.title: Lala Stay
landing.welcome.title: Welcome
landing.welcome.body: Welcome to Lala Stay! We hope you enjoy your stay.
landing.howto.title: How to Use
landing.howto.body: Scan the QR code in your room to open your room's guide page.
landing.contact.title: Contact
landing.contact.body: For questions, please message us through your booking platform. In an emergency, call 119 (ambulance/fire), 112 (police), or 1330 (Korea Travel Helpline, 24-hour, multilingual).
